$note: Synthetic IT CVs for the calibration harness (pnpm calibrate). Add real CVs (e.g. Kaggle tech resumes / team CVs) to reach ~20-30 for a meaningful stddev measurement. Each entry: id, target_role (must match a role_code in role-rubrics-pilot.json), parsed_text (raw CV text as the extractor would receive).
